context: Histo:  alveoli filled with eosinophils Type III reaction = delayed immune complex response = Arthus reaction (IgG- mediated) Histo:  bronchocentric granulomas + mucoid impaction; fungal hyphae without tissue invasion CXR: √  initial CXR normal in up to 50% √  NORMAL peripheral bronchi √  hyperinflation ← bronchospasm / emphysema (a)  early stage: √  migratory pneumonitis = ill-defined homogeneous transient recurrent "fleeting" alveolar patchy subsegmental / lobar opacities (in up to 90%) Location:   upper lobes (50%), lower lobes (20%), middle lobe (7%); both lungs (65%) Duration:   may persi
